choices.text: Planner → parallel search → evaluator → (loop or synthesize). Planner breaks query into sub-questions; parallel search each; evaluator checks coverage; if gaps, more search; synthesizer compiles cited answer. Like Perplexity / Search GPT. Standard research agent pattern.

questions.explanation: Plan → parallel search → evaluate → loop or synthesize. Perplexity-style.

questions.prompt: Research agent answers without sources; can't verify. Fix?

choices.text: Always include citations in synthesize prompt. 'Cite sources [1], [2] for every claim. Include URLs.' LLM associates each fact with source. Display sources in UI; users verify. Trust + transparency. Standard research / RAG pattern. Without citations: hallucinations untraceable; users don't trust.

questions.explanation: Citations in synthesize prompt. Display sources for verification.
